evidence_summary: Establish a grounded night landscape in the Arizona mountains before executing a violent, high-concept VFX transition that displaces the protagonist from the physical world into deep space.

While observing the landscape, the protagonist becomes mesmerized by Mars (the red star). He feels an irresistible pull toward it. As he closes his eyes, he is violently transported through space into darkness and cold.
From mesmerized trance to sudden, overwhelming cosmic displacement.

The protagonist is mesmerized by Mars, closes his eyes, and is violently transported through space.
